name: Golden path: ransomware-like behavior isolated and memorialized with executive incident report
description: Crisis-era storytelling without live malware: EDR-compatible heuristics mimic destructive-file patterns on one endpoint; containment isolates lateral movement hypotheses, restores confidence through backup/control attestations, and produces board-usable timelines and regulatory-flavored appendix structure (synthetic).

simulated_timeline.synthetic_narrative: EDR sends SecureWatch deterministic bundle: entropy spike + rapid renaming on FIN-CLUSTER-EDGE-LAPTOP-22 (fixture labels only)—mapped to treasury-adjacent business context for prioritization speech.
Automated containment stub isolates host; conditional access simulations challenge privileged breakout paths; CIO bridge line opened with scripted stakeholder list.
Immutable backup snapshots verified for restore-point currency; ransomware-style integrity checks synthesized as passed for demo readers.
SecureWatch composes chronological narrative linking detect→contain→validate→resume with references to SOC 2 / SEC cyber disclosure talking-point placeholders (generic).

payload.title: DEMO: Ransomware-like endpoint behavior escalated under IR protocol (synthetic)

events_emitted.headline: Detection articulated for non-technical leaders
events_emitted.synthetic_detail: Plain-language parallels to business continuity KPIs—not vendor signatures.

events_emitted.synthetic_detail: Board appendix references control families and timelines without regulated content.

expected_agents_triggered.triggered_reason_synthetic: Destructive heuristic triggers full IR escalation model with deterministic comms scaffolding.
Backup/recovery attestations intersect with modeled compliance regimes for audit readiness language.

expected_remediation.summary: Sustain isolation until forensic clone stub completes, validate backup restore drill outcomes, uplift detection for analogous host cohort, finalize incident report with regulators-ready annex skeleton.

expected_autonomous_remediation.synthetic_action: Trigger isolation workflows and ephemeral jump-box restrictions for responders.

expected_human_approval_gates.synthetic_rationale: Executive communications calibrated to legal—not technical—risk appetite.

expected_final_report.title: Incident leadership packet — ransomware-like containment with defensible timelines
expected_final_report.synthetic_executive_summary: We detected behavior consistent with ransomware precursors on a prioritized endpoint, enforced isolation before lateral movement narratives took hold, demonstrated backup immutable restore readiness, and published an executive-ready incident record suitable for auditors, insurers, and public-company rehearsal teams—built entirely from synthetic markers.

golden_path_demo.executive_timeline_summary: Sub-two-minute routing from alert to deterministic containment playbook; first executive readout drafted within hour-one with expanding precision through forensic and backup validations—shows muscle memory enterprises pay retainers for.

expected_database_outputs.business_outcome: Demonstrates escalation states with board-facing severity tagging.
Line-item containment + recovery milestones with RACI overlays.
Immutable references to timelines, transcripts, telemetry bundles (fixtures).
Chain-of-command events for escalation strength and approvals.
